zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Greystoke於大約1215年出生在英國波藍德格斯托可時，她的父親Thomas de Greystoke27歲，母親Christian Veteripont22歲。她和Lord 'Ralph Fitzwilliam II至少有1個兒子。她去世於1272年之後在英國林可爾史爾格利姆斯索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Greystoke于大约1215年出生在英国波藍德格斯托可时，她的父亲Thomas de Greystoke27岁，母亲Christian Veteripont22岁。她和Lord 'Ralph Fitzwilliam II至少有1个儿子。她去世于1272年之后在英国林可爾史爾格利姆斯索普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Greystoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Greystoke was born about 1215, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, her father, Thomas de Greystoke, was 27 and her mother, Christian Veteripont, was 22. She had at least 1 son with Lord 'Ralph Fitzwilliam II. She died after 1272, in Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Greystoke est née environ 1215, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Greystoke, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Christian Veteripont, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Lord 'Ralph Fitzwilliam II. Elle est décédée après 1272, à Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Greystoke um 1215 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Greystoke 27 und ihre Mutter Christian Veteripont 22. Sie hatte mit Lord 'Ralph Fitzwilliam II mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 1272 in Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Greystoke è nata il circa 1215 nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Thomas de Greystoke, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Christian Veteripont, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Lord 'Ralph Fitzwilliam II. Morì dopo il 1272, nel Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Greystokeが約1215年にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクで生まれた時，父Thomas de Greystokeは27歳，母Christian Veteripontは22歳であった。彼女はLord 'Ralph Fitzwilliam IIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1272年以後にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグリムスソルペで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Greystoke(이)가 대략 1215년 영국 c벌랜드 그리스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Greystoke(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Veteripont(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Lord 'Ralph Fitzwilliam II(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1272년 이후 영국 링코실르 그림스소에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Greystoke nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Greystoke, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Christian Veteripont, tinha 22 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Greystoke родилась около 1215 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Greystoke было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Veteripont, 22. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Lord 'Ralph Fitzwilliam II. Она умерла после 1272 г. в местности гримстаурп, линколншир, Англия.
